case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. WILLIAM C. GRAVES

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-09-2017 CONTINUED TO OCT-03-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-09-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAVES, WILLIAM C. $9,201.49 PRINCIPAL, $282.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,483.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100015953)
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT (1033) (TRANSACTION ID # 100015953) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT GRAVES, WILLIAM C. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-22-2017
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-09-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $282.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100015953) AS TO DEFENDANT GRAVES, WILLIAM C.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100014621), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED APR-04-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-16-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT GRAVES, WILLIAM C.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-03-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GRAVES, WILLIAM C.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GRAVES, WILLIAM C.
